info.title: Mobile Money Bridge API
info.description: API for bridging mobile money providers (MTN, Airtel, Orange) with the Stellar network. This spec is generated at runtime from Zod schemas — it is always in sync with validation logic.

tags.name: SEP-38 Quotes
tags.description: SEP-38 Quote & Price Stream protocol — firm quotes locked in Redis

tags.name: SEP-30 Key Recovery
tags.description: SEP-30 Multi-Sig Key Recovery — M-of-N cryptographic recovery sessions with full audit trail

message.example: Amount must be a positive number

password.description: Minimum 12 characters, must include uppercase, lowercase, and a special character.

phoneNumber.description: E.164 or local format phone number

stellarAddress.description: Stellar public key (56 chars, starts with G)

destinationValue.description: E.164 phone number or Stellar public key depending on destinationType

notes.example: The ID is too blurry to read the expiration date.

sell_asset.description: SEP-38 asset identifier. Format: "iso4217:<CODE>" for fiat, "stellar:XLM" for native XLM, or "stellar:<CODE>:<ISSUER>" for Stellar assets.

buy_asset.description: SEP-38 asset identifier. Format: "iso4217:<CODE>" for fiat, "stellar:XLM" for native XLM, or "stellar:<CODE>:<ISSUER>" for Stellar assets.

Sep38AssetPair.description: A supported sell → buy asset pair.

sell_asset.description: SEP-38 asset identifier. Format: "iso4217:<CODE>" for fiat, "stellar:XLM" for native XLM, or "stellar:<CODE>:<ISSUER>" for Stellar assets.

buy_asset.description: SEP-38 asset identifier. Format: "iso4217:<CODE>" for fiat, "stellar:XLM" for native XLM, or "stellar:<CODE>:<ISSUER>" for Stellar assets.

price.description: Units of buy_asset per 1 unit of sell_asset.

fee_percent.description: Percentage fee applied to this conversion.

Sep38PriceResponse.description: Indicative or firm price for an asset pair.

sell_asset.description: SEP-38 asset identifier. Format: "iso4217:<CODE>" for fiat, "stellar:XLM" for native XLM, or "stellar:<CODE>:<ISSUER>" for Stellar assets.

buy_asset.description: SEP-38 asset identifier. Format: "iso4217:<CODE>" for fiat, "stellar:XLM" for native XLM, or "stellar:<CODE>:<ISSUER>" for Stellar assets.

sell_amount.description: Amount to sell. Provide exactly one of sell_amount or buy_amount.

buy_amount.description: Amount to receive. Provide exactly one of sell_amount or buy_amount.

ttl.description: Quote lifetime in seconds (1–300). Defaults to 60.

sell_asset.description: SEP-38 asset identifier. Format: "iso4217:<CODE>" for fiat, "stellar:XLM" for native XLM, or "stellar:<CODE>:<ISSUER>" for Stellar assets.

buy_asset.description: SEP-38 asset identifier. Format: "iso4217:<CODE>" for fiat, "stellar:XLM" for native XLM, or "stellar:<CODE>:<ISSUER>" for Stellar assets.

state.description: FSM state: pending → collecting_approvals → awaiting_completion → completed | rejected

approvedBy.description: List of signer public keys that have submitted valid signatures

requestedNewAddress.description: Optional custom Stellar address to rotate to. NULL = generate fresh keypair.

Sep30RecoverySession.description: Multi-sig key recovery session tracking state, approvals, and audit info.

requestedNewAddress.description: Optional: rotate to a specific Stellar address instead of generating a fresh one.

signature.description: Base64 Stellar signature of the token bytes made with the signer's private key.

token.description: Raw hex token to sign with your Stellar private key.

sessionId.description: ID from /session. Required for multi-signer flows.

List supported asset pairs
get.description: Returns all asset pairs that this anchor supports for conversion. Wallets use this to discover which currencies they can convert between.

get.summary: Get indicative price for an asset pair
get.description: Returns a live, indicative exchange rate for the requested sell_asset → buy_asset pair. Rates include a small market spread and may fluctuate. Use POST /sep38/quote to lock in a firm rate.

get.summary: Get indicative price for a single asset pair (singular alias)
get.description: Identical to GET /sep38/prices — provided for clients that expect the singular form.

post.summary: Create a firm quote (locked in Redis for TTL seconds)
post.description: Generates a firm, time-locked quote for a specific asset conversion. The quote is stored in Redis and guaranteed for the duration of its TTL (default 60 s, max 300 s). Provide either sell_amount (amount you send) or buy_amount (amount you want to receive).

400.description: Validation error or unsupported asset pair

get.summary: Retrieve a stored quote by ID
get.description: Looks up a previously created quote from Redis. Returns 404 if the quote was never created, and 410 if it has expired.

post.summary: Create a new managed Stellar key for a user
post.description: Generates a fresh Stellar keypair, encrypts the secret with AES-256-GCM, and stores it. The plaintext secret never leaves the server.

get.summary: List managed keys for a user

patch.summary: Update the M-of-N recovery threshold for a managed key

post.summary: Register a recovery signer
post.description: Adds a guardian or device key that can participate in M-of-N recovery.

get.summary: List recovery signers

post.summary: [Step 0] Open a new multi-sig recovery session
post.description: Creates a recovery session in state `pending`. Each signer calls /initiate and /approve independently, referencing this session ID. Once M-of-N approvals are collected the session advances to `awaiting_completion` and /complete can be called.

400.description: Active session already exists or validation error

post.summary: [Step 1] Issue a challenge token to a recovery signer
post.description: Generates a cryptographically random token. The signer must sign the raw token bytes with their Stellar private key and submit the base64 signature to /approve.

post.summary: [Step 2] Submit cryptographic proof — signer approves recovery
post.description: Verifies the Stellar signature over the challenge token. Adds the signer to the `approved_by` list. When `approved_by.length >= required_approvals`, session advances to `awaiting_completion`.

post.summary: [Step 3] Finalise recovery and rotate the key
post.description: Rotates the managed key to a new keypair (or the pre-specified address), marks the old key inactive, and closes the session as `completed`. Only callable when session.state === "awaiting_completion".

post.summary: Cancel an in-progress recovery session

get.summary: List all recovery sessions for a managed key
Get a specific recovery session
Get the full audit log for a recovery session
get.description: Returns every state transition, signer approval, and metadata event.

post.summary: Planned key rotation (owner-initiated, no recovery required)
